reviews.title: Such a positive experience
reviews.quote: Apart from meeting so many great dogs, the thing I liked most about the course was Liza and the great group of us girls working together towards a new career. There were ups and downs, tears and laughter and overall such a positive experience.
reviews.author: Anonymous

reviews.title: Totally recommend it
reviews.quote: Since finishing I have set up a small business on my own. And while it is small, it's growing and I meet lovely dogs and people. I'm much happier than before I completed the course and totally recommend it. 5 🌟
reviews.author: Anonymous

reviews.title: Taught me way more than I thought
reviews.quote: I have just completed the level 2 dog grooming assistant course and I have had an amazing time. Liza is an amazing teacher and has taught me way more than I thought I could have learned in the past 5 weeks. Definitely worth doing especially if you love animals! Thank you Liza.
reviews.author: Charlotte

reviews.title: Thoroughly enjoyed the experience
reviews.quote: I recently had a day of learning to groom my own pooch! Always wanted to do it myself as she cry’s like a baby every time I leave her at local groomers, but I have never had the confidence. I finally took ‘the plunge’ and I thoroughly enjoyed the whole experience and all the useful information that Liza taught us. Liza has such a natural ability and skill with dogs (and people) that she gave us all the confidence we needed.
reviews.author: Sue

reviews.title: A Doggy Goddess!!!
reviews.quote: She is the bravest, hardest working groomer/trainer I've ever had the pleasure of meeting and I am so honoured that she agreed to help us and has been grooming our dog over the past year. I really don't know what we wouldve done without her support! A doggy goddess!!!
reviews.author: Donna

reviews.title: Always gave clear instructions
reviews.quote: Our Poochon, Chloe and us had a nice time doing a 1 day groom your dog course. Liza was really helpful and encouraging and always gave clear instructions. She was really patient to Chloe. We would really highly recommend.
reviews.author: Saan

reviews.title: Huge amount of experience
reviews.quote: I completed the City and Guilds 6 week course and it has provided me with all the knowledge I needed to become a dog groomer. Liza has a huge amount of experience and adapts her teaching style to each individual student. She makes sure you have the knowledge, skill and confidence to become a groomer as soon as you finish the course. She is even there to support you once you’ve finished which is very reassuring! Would definitely recommend Liza and her team to anyone wanting to become a dog groomer!
reviews.author: Lauren
